title: Add PageUp/PageDown scroll buttons to the keys pad
action: Add two buttons to the keys pad secondary row that send herdr keys 'pageup' and 'pagedown' (labels ⇞ / ⇟, aria Scroll up / Scroll down) so the human can scroll inside a full-screen TUI agent (which keeps no terminal scrollback). They use the existing .key-btn click handler (sendKeys then poll). Distinguish them from the ↑/↓ arrow-navigation keys.

truths: Two new buttons send pageup and pagedown via sendKeys
They reuse the existing key handler + poll
They are visually distinct from the arrow navigation keys
artifacts: pageup/pagedown buttons in terminal.ts keys pad
prohibitions: Do not change the arrow/enter/space/esc keys

verify: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Added ⇞/⇟ PageUp/PageDown scroll keys so the human can scroll inside a full-screen TUI agent (no terminal scrollback)
trace.verify_output: bundle ok; vitest 20 passed; cargo test + clippy clean. Browser: keys pad shows tinted ⇞/⇟ (Scroll up/down) distinct from arrows; clicking Scroll up sends pageup (screen gained <pageup>).
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
